openneuro 0.1.0

Get Cache Root Directory

Source: R/cache-path.R
dot-on_cache_root.Rd

Returns the root directory for openneuroR cache storage, using CRAN-compliant location via tools::R_user_dir(). Creates the directory if it doesn't exist.

Usage

.on_cache_root()

Value

Path to the cache root directory.

Details

Platform-appropriate paths:

  • Mac: ~/Library/Caches/R/openneuroR

  • Linux: ~/.cache/R/openneuroR

  • Windows: ~/AppData/Local/R/cache/openneuroR

Options

The cache root can be overridden by setting the openneuro.cache_root option:


options(openneuro.cache_root = "/custom/path")

On this page
